title: A Deep Dive of LangGraph Mechanisms & Agent Design Patterns
summary: An unexpected double execution in my CVE agent became the crack that opened LangGraph’s runtime. Under the hood, its “soul” looks closer to Google’s large-scale graph computing model, Pregel—powered by the Bulk Synchronous Parallel (BSP) philosophy
content: An unexpected double execution in my CVE agent became the crack that opened LangGraph’s runtime. Under the hood, its “soul” looks closer to Google’s large-scale graph computing model, Pregel—powered by the Bulk Synchronous Parallel (BSP) philosophy
